title: lepidium drummondii
intro: Lepidium drummondii, also known as Drummond's cress or pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Lepidium drummondii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
